name: tsa-youth-week-26
description: The Salvation Army IBCC Youth Fellowship — Youth Retreat 2026 Showcase

scripts.dev: npm run build && nodemon --ext js,css,ejs --ignore public/css/*.min.css --ignore public/js/*.min.js --ignore public/js/*.map -x "npm run build && node app.js"
scripts.build:css: cleancss -O2 -o public/css/style.min.css public/css/style.css && cleancss -O2 -o public/css/admin.min.css public/css/admin.css && cleancss -O2 -o public/css/admin-login.min.css public/css/admin-login.css && cleancss -O2 -o public/css/admin-registrant.min.css public/css/admin-registrant.css && cleancss -O2 -o public/css/admin-contact.min.css public/css/admin-contact.css
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js
